name: Hidrovias do Brasil S.A.
summary: Hidrovias do Brasil S.A. provides integrated logistics solutions in Latin America. The company also offers cargo storage and lifting, intermediation and agency, long-distance sea transport, warehousing, specialized cargo terminal, fluvial transportation, and navigation assets leasing services. It also operates as a financial operations agency. The company operates its services on the various corridors, including Paran√É¬°-Paraguay waterway, the Uruguay river, and the Montevideo terminal; Tapaj√É¬≥s and Amazonas rivers; and Trombetas and Amazonas rivers.
